work_title: The Kink Education Code of Conduct (KECC), version 1

version_status.source_self_limitation: The PDF FAQ describes version 1 as imperfect and incomplete, expects practices and terminology to change, and anticipates later revision.
version_status.corpus_rule: Every derivative must retain version-1/2019 historical scope and must not present the document as current community consensus.

network_boundary.note: The allowlisted PDF contains its own FAQ and adoption pages; those embedded pages were manually reviewed without requesting their separate HTML routes. The Creative Commons legal-code route was linked by the allowlisted deed and used only for licence context.

full_html.image_role: Creative Commons badge in shared footer, excluded and not fetched

homepage_html.image_role: Creative Commons badge in shared footer, excluded and not fetched

normalization_and_review_method.html_audit_normalization: Python standard-library HTMLParser captured h1-h4, p, and li text; collapsed internal whitespace; wrote one LF-terminated block; used only for deterministic navigation and integrity metrics.
normalization_and_review_method.pdf_audit_extraction: pypdf 6.14.2 extracted all 24 digital pages with a form-feed separator; the extraction was used only for complete review, visible-date verification, and source comparison.
normalization_and_review_method.manual_transformation: Every accepted concept was selected, paraphrased, condensed, reorganized, attributed at claim level, and checked against the source section. No audit extraction was emitted as the training artifact.

rights_review.source_notice: The KECC pages state that the work is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution-ShareAlike 4.0 International.
rights_review.sharealike_output_metadata: CORPUS.md is licensed under CC BY-SA 4.0 as an adapted work.

retained_topics: visible modeling of informed continuous noncoerced consent
student-demonstration power differentials preference order and anti-pressure safeguards
topic-specific competence and qualification or opinion disclosure
respect for student risk profiles and ability to audit
inclusion accessibility diverse perspectives reporting and staff response
accountability learning contacts circles conflict awareness and information repository
bidirectional vetting and de facto endorsement
injury consent-incident accountability and exclusion disclosure
privacy informed-choice community-safety and response tensions

excluded_identifiers: file hashes and retrieval details as training facts
excluded_operational_material: portable time thresholds presented as safe harbors

citation_policy.uncited_text_allowed: adaptation notices, explicit corpus safety limitations, and derivation rules only

split_hygiene.document_disjoint_requirement: Assign the KECC homepage, full-version HTML, PDF, this Markdown, and every derivative to one source-family split before chunking or derivation.
